spec_match.rationale: Uses if(media()) / if(supports()) / if(style()) — the three branches the spec defines.

interactive.rationale: Buttons toggle a style query custom property and re-render the live target.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index blurb describes inline conditionals; the page demonstrates exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show empty fallback (no arm matches), nested if(), or parse-error cases.

design_system.rationale: Mostly variables but raw `#111` / `#ff0` / `#fdfcf8` / `#000` appear inline. Some are content (target paint colour) but `#fdfcf8` duplicates `--bg-ivory` — switch to the token.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate the empty-fallback case
openQuestions.detail: When no condition matches, if() resolves to an empty token stream. Add a button that intentionally fails all arms and show the resulting computed style.

openQuestions.title: Show nested if()
openQuestions.detail: Add a snippet showing one if() inside another arm.

summary: Solid foundational concept covering the three if() branches; missing-arm and nested cases would round it out.
